title: Desires of the Heart
overview: A psychiatrist from India practicing in Savannah, Georgia when he meets Madeline, a local artist with a mysterious past. While their relationship begins to blossom in America, Kris is summoned home by his brother to marry the woman chosen by his parents.  But as he begins to make decisions about his future, he discovers centuries old secrets that may seal the fate of his destiny
